title: Executive Order 5403—Power-Site Restoration No. 443, Pit River, California
text:
So much of the order of November 19, 1912, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 316, as affects the lands hereinafter described, is hereby revoked:
Mount Diablo Meridian
T. 37 N., R. 7 E., sec. 34, NW. ¼ of SE. ¼.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
July 25, 1930.
